import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut has_digit = false
  mut negative = false
  while i < n
    let b = string.byte_at(s, i).ok_or(0)
    match b
    when Ok(byte)
      if byte == 32 or byte == 9 or byte == 13 or byte == 10
        if has_digit
          let val = string.parse_int(current).ok_or(0)
          match val
          when Ok(v)
            if negative
              result = list.push(result, 0 - v)
            else
              result = list.push(result, v)
            end
          when Err(_)
            ()
          end
          current = ""
          has_digit = false
          negative = false
        end
      else if byte == 45 and not has_digit
        negative = true
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(byte)}"
        has_digit = true
      end
    when Err(_)
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit
    let val = string.parse_int(current).ok_or(0)
    match val
    when Ok(v)
      if negative
        result = list.push(result, 0 - v)
      else
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when Err(_)
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn find_pair(_ nums: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<String>
  let n = list.len(nums)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut j = i + 1
    while j < n
      let a = list.get(nums, i).ok_or(0)
      let b = list.get(nums, j).ok_or(0)
      match a
      when Ok(av)
        match b
        when Ok(bv)
          if av + bv == target
            return Some("found=#{i},#{j}")
          end
        when Err(_)
          ()
        end
      when Err(_)
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  None
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = io.read_line()
  match line1
  when Some(l1)
    let line2 = io.read_line()
    match line2
    when Some(l2)
      let nums = parse_ints(l1)
      let t_str = string.trim(l2)
      let t_opt = string.parse_int(t_str)
      match t_opt
      when Some(t)
        let result = find_pair(nums, t)
        match result
        when Some(msg)
          print(msg)
        when None
          print("none")
        end
      when None
        print("none")
      end
    when None
      print("none")
    end
  when None
    print("none")
  end
end
